concerns.sentence: Other findings include rapid Afib [E:note:row514701:7], total body anasarca [E:note:row514701:13], and impaired skin integrity with excoriations on coccyx and scrotum [E:note:row514701:24][E:note:row514701:25].
concerns.reason: The summary interprets a heart rate of 130-150 as 'rapid Afib', but the fact sheet only provides the heart rate without specifying the rhythm.
The fact sheet only lists 'Acidosis', not 'progressive metabolic acidosis'.

recommended_revisions.original: Other findings include rapid Afib [E:note:row514701:7], total body anasarca [E:note:row514701:13], and impaired skin integrity with excoriations on coccyx and scrotum [E:note:row514701:24][E:note:row514701:25].
recommended_revisions.suggested: Other findings include tachycardia (HR 130-150) [E:note:row514701:7], total body anasarca [E:note:row514701:13], and impaired skin integrity with excoriations on coccyx and scrotum [E:note:row514701:24][E:note:row514701:25].
recommended_revisions.reason: Corrects the misinterpretation of heart rate as Atrial Fibrillation.
Aligns the terminology with the provided fact sheet.
